abilities.name: Death Guard Defenders
abilities.description: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly ^^**Death Guard Infantry^^** units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.description: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Fevered Strategist
abilities.description: Once per Battle Round, one model from your army with this ability can use it when a friendly ^^**Death Guard^^** unit within 12" of that model is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that Stratagem by 1CP.

abilities.name: Miasma of Pestilence (Aura)
abilities.description: While a friendly ^^**Death Guard^^** unit is within 6" of this model, each time a ranged attack targets that unit, models in that unit have the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

abilities.name: Droning Chorus
abilities.description: Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [ASSAULT] ability.

abilities.name: Insectile Murmuration
abilities.description: Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is within Contagion Range of one or more DEATH GUARD units from your army, re‑roll a Wound roll of 1.

abilities.name: Rejuvenating Swarm
abilities.description: At the end of each phase, the bearer regains all of its lost wounds.

abilities.name: Plagueveil
abilities.description: While the bearer’s unit is within range of one or more objective markers that you control, that unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

abilities.name: Daemon Weapon of Nurgle
abilities.description: Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

abilities.name: Furnace of Plagues
abilities.description: Add 1 to the Strength and Attacks characteristics of the bearer's melee weapons, and the bearer's melee weapons have the Devastating Wounds abilty.

abilities.name: Lord of the Walking Pox
abilities.description: If the bearer is leading a ^^**Poxwalkers**^^ unit, and is in Strategic Reserves, for the purposes of setting up that unit on the battlefield, treat the current battle round as the third battle round.

abilities.name: Revolting Regeneration
abilities.description: The bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

abilities.name: Eye of Affliction
abilities.description: Ranged weapons equipped by model's in the bearer's unit have the [Ignores Cover] ability while targeting an Afflicted enemy unit.

abilities.name: Talisman of Burgeoning
abilities.description: While the bearer is leading a ^^**Poxwalkers**^^ unit, add 1 to the Toughness characteristic of ^^**Poxwalkers**^^ models in that unit.

abilities.name: Witherbone Pipes
abilities.description: While the bearer is leading a ^^**Poxwalkers**^^ unit, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit, and each time that unit takes a Battle-shock or Leadership test, add 1 to that test.

abilities.name: Sorrowsyphon
abilities.description: While the bearer is leading a ^^**Poxwalkers**^^ unit, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of the bearer's Plague Wind weapon. Each time the bearer makes one or more attacks with a Plague Wind weapon, after the bearer's unit has resolved its attacks, D3 Bodyguard models from the bearer's unit are destroyed.

abilities.name: Face of Death
abilities.description: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer's unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Vile Vigour
abilities.description: While the bearer is leading a unit, add 1" to the Movement characteristics of models in that unit and you can re-roll Advance rolls made for that unit.

abilities.name: Warprot Talisman
abilities.description: Once per battle, at the end of your opponent's turn, if the bearer's unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battle field and place it into Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Helm of the Fly King
abilities.description: While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit cannot be targeted by ranged attacks unless the attacking model is within 18".

abilities.name: Arch Contaminator
abilities.description: While the bearer's unit is within range of an objective marker you control, each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Bilemaw Blight
abilities.description: At the start of your Shooting phase, until the end of the phase, add 12" to the Range characteristics of the bearer's Plague Wind weapon.

abilities.name: Shriekworm Familiar
abilities.description: Once per battle round, you can target the bearer's unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem for 0CP.

abilities.name: Tendrilous Emissions
abilities.description: While the bearer is within 3" of one or more friendly ^^**Death Guard Vehicle**^^ units, the bearer has the Lone Operative ability, and each time one of those ^^**Vehicle**^^ units makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit visible to the bearer, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

abilities.name: Final Ingredient
abilities.description: Once per battle, after the bearer's unit has fought, if one or more ^^**Character**^^ models were destroyed by those attacks, select one Plague. Until the end of the battle, if an enemy unit is Afflicted, that unit has the effect of the selected Plague in addition to any other.

abilities.name: Visions of Virulence
abilities.description: While an enemy unit is enfeebled by the bearer's Pestilent Fallout ability, that unit is also Afflicted.

abilities.name: Needle of Nurgle
abilities.description: Each time the bearer uses its Tainted Narthecium ability, you can return up to D3 destroyed models to the bearer's unit (instead of 1).

abilities.name: Cornucophagus
abilities.description: In the Declare Battle Formations step, select one Plague. Until the end of the battle, while an enemy is within Contagion Range of the bearer, that enemy unit has the effect of that Plague in addition to any other.

abilities.name: Beckoning Blight
abilities.description: Each time a ^^**Plague Legions^^** unit from your army is set up on the battle field using the Deep Strike ability, if it is set up wholly within 12" of the bearer, it can be set up anywhere that is more than 6" horizontally away from any enemy models, instead of more than 9".

abilities.name: Fell Harvester
abilities.description: Add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer's melee weapons.

abilities.name: Entropic Knell
abilities.description: In the Battle-shock step of your opponent's Command phase, each enemy unit within 6" of the bearer that is below its Starting Strength must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.

abilities.name: Tome of Bounteous Blessings
abilities.description: Each time a ^^**Plague Legions^^** unit within 12" of the bearer takes a Battle-shock test, add 1 to that test and, if that test is passed, one model in that unit regains up to D3 lost wounds (if that unit is a ^^**Battleline^^** unit and that test is passed, up to D3 destroyed models can be returned to that unit instead).

abilities.name: Slitherswift Limbs
abilities.description: Add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for this model's unit.

abilities.name: Veil of Flies
abilities.description: Models in this model's unit have the Stealth ability.

abilities.name: Febrile Vitality
abilities.description: Add 1" to the Move characteristic of models in this model's unit.

abilities.name: Billowing Miasma
abilities.description: Add 6" to this model's Contagion Range.

abilities.name: Grossly Swollen
abilities.description: Add 2 to this model's Wounds characteristic.

abilities.name: Leprous Insensibility
abilities.description: This model has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

abilities.name: Writhing Tentacles
abilities.description: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model.

abilities.name: Touch of Rot
abilities.description: Improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model by 1.

abilities.name: Plaguesight
abilities.description: Each time this model makes an attack that targets an Afflicted unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

units.name: Daemon Prince of Nurgle with wings

abilities.name: Horrifying Visage
abilities.description: Each time this model ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it. That unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.description: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Enfeebling Miasma (Aura)
abilities.description: While an enemy unit (excluding ^^*Monsters^^** and ^^**Vehicles^^**) is within 6" of this model, each time that unit is selected to Fall Back, models in that enemy unit must take Desperate Escape tests. When doing so, if that enemy unit is Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from each of those Desperate Escape tests.

abilities.name: Plaguesight
abilities.description: Each time this model makes an attack that targets an Afflicted unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

units.transportCapacity: This model has a transport capacity of 12 ^^**Death Guard Infantry**^^ models. It cannot transport ^^**Terminator**^^ models.

abilities.name: Host of Plagues
abilities.description: At the end of your Movement phase, roll one D6 for each enemy unit within 6" of this model, adding 1 to the result if that unit is Afflicted; on a 3+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Lord of the Death Guard
abilities.description: Once per turn, this model can use one of the Lord of the Death Guard abilties.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-6 wounds remaining
abilities.description: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.description: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Unclean Icon
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

abilities.name: Blessed Icon of Disease
abilities.description: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly ^^**Death Guard^^** unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

abilities.name: Droning Chorus
abilities.description: Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [ASSAULT] ability.

abilities.name: Insectile Murmuration
abilities.description: Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is within Contagion Range of one or more DEATH GUARD units from your army, re‑roll a Wound roll of 1.

abilities.name: Rejuvenating Swarm
abilities.description: At the end of each phase, the bearer regains all of its lost wounds.

abilities.name: Plagueveil
abilities.description: While the bearer’s unit is within range of one or more objective markers that you control, that unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

abilities.name: Daemon Weapon of Nurgle
abilities.description: Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

abilities.name: Furnace of Plagues
abilities.description: Add 1 to the Strength and Attacks characteristics of the bearer's melee weapons, and the bearer's melee weapons have the Devastating Wounds abilty.

abilities.name: Lord of the Walking Pox
abilities.description: If the bearer is leading a ^^**Poxwalkers**^^ unit, and is in Strategic Reserves, for the purposes of setting up that unit on the battlefield, treat the current battle round as the third battle round.

abilities.name: Revolting Regeneration
abilities.description: The bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

abilities.name: Eye of Affliction
abilities.description: Ranged weapons equipped by model's in the bearer's unit have the [Ignores Cover] ability while targeting an Afflicted enemy unit.

abilities.name: Talisman of Burgeoning
abilities.description: While the bearer is leading a ^^**Poxwalkers**^^ unit, add 1 to the Toughness characteristic of ^^**Poxwalkers**^^ models in that unit.

abilities.name: Witherbone Pipes
abilities.description: While the bearer is leading a ^^**Poxwalkers**^^ unit, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit, and each time that unit takes a Battle-shock or Leadership test, add 1 to that test.

abilities.name: Sorrowsyphon
abilities.description: While the bearer is leading a ^^**Poxwalkers**^^ unit, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of the bearer's Plague Wind weapon. Each time the bearer makes one or more attacks with a Plague Wind weapon, after the bearer's unit has resolved its attacks, D3 Bodyguard models from the bearer's unit are destroyed.

abilities.name: Face of Death
abilities.description: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer's unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Vile Vigour
abilities.description: While the bearer is leading a unit, add 1" to the Movement characteristics of models in that unit and you can re-roll Advance rolls made for that unit.

abilities.name: Warprot Talisman
abilities.description: Once per battle, at the end of your opponent's turn, if the bearer's unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battle field and place it into Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Helm of the Fly King
abilities.description: While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit cannot be targeted by ranged attacks unless the attacking model is within 18".

abilities.name: Arch Contaminator
abilities.description: While the bearer's unit is within range of an objective marker you control, each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Bilemaw Blight
abilities.description: At the start of your Shooting phase, until the end of the phase, add 12" to the Range characteristics of the bearer's Plague Wind weapon.

abilities.name: Shriekworm Familiar
abilities.description: Once per battle round, you can target the bearer's unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem for 0CP.

abilities.name: Tendrilous Emissions
abilities.description: While the bearer is within 3" of one or more friendly ^^**Death Guard Vehicle**^^ units, the bearer has the Lone Operative ability, and each time one of those ^^**Vehicle**^^ units makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit visible to the bearer, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

abilities.name: Final Ingredient
abilities.description: Once per battle, after the bearer's unit has fought, if one or more ^^**Character**^^ models were destroyed by those attacks, select one Plague. Until the end of the battle, if an enemy unit is Afflicted, that unit has the effect of the selected Plague in addition to any other.

abilities.name: Visions of Virulence
abilities.description: While an enemy unit is enfeebled by the bearer's Pestilent Fallout ability, that unit is also Afflicted.

abilities.name: Needle of Nurgle
abilities.description: Each time the bearer uses its Tainted Narthecium ability, you can return up to D3 destroyed models to the bearer's unit (instead of 1).

abilities.name: Cornucophagus
abilities.description: In the Declare Battle Formations step, select one Plague. Until the end of the battle, while an enemy is within Contagion Range of the bearer, that enemy unit has the effect of that Plague in addition to any other.

abilities.name: Beckoning Blight
abilities.description: Each time a ^^**Plague Legions^^** unit from your army is set up on the battle field using the Deep Strike ability, if it is set up wholly within 12" of the bearer, it can be set up anywhere that is more than 6" horizontally away from any enemy models, instead of more than 9".

abilities.name: Fell Harvester
abilities.description: Add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer's melee weapons.

abilities.name: Entropic Knell
abilities.description: In the Battle-shock step of your opponent's Command phase, each enemy unit within 6" of the bearer that is below its Starting Strength must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.

abilities.name: Tome of Bounteous Blessings
abilities.description: Each time a ^^**Plague Legions^^** unit within 12" of the bearer takes a Battle-shock test, add 1 to that test and, if that test is passed, one model in that unit regains up to D3 lost wounds (if that unit is a ^^**Battleline^^** unit and that test is passed, up to D3 destroyed models can be returned to that unit instead).

abilities.description: Add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for this model's unit.

abilities.name: Veil of Flies
abilities.description: Models in this model's unit have the Stealth ability.

abilities.description: Add 1" to the Move characteristic of models in this model's unit.

abilities.name: Billowing Miasma
abilities.description: Add 6" to this model's Contagion Range.

abilities.description: Add 2 to this model's Wounds characteristic.

abilities.name: Leprous Insensibility
abilities.description: This model has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

abilities.name: Writhing Tentacles
abilities.description: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model.

abilities.name: Touch of Rot
abilities.description: Improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model by 1.

abilities.description: Each time this model makes an attack that targets an Afflicted unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Putrescent Fog (Aura)
abilities.description: Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield as Reinforcements cannot be set up within 12" of this model.

abilities.name: Diseased Cover
abilities.description: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this **^^Fortification^^**, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

abilities.name: Deployment
abilities.description: Both parts of this ^^**Fortification**^^ must be deployed within 1" of each other. Both parts are then treated as a single model for all rules purposes.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.description:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- ^^**Plague Marines^^**

abilities.name: Gift of Poxes
abilities.description: Add 3" to the range of this model's Contagion Range.

abilities.name: Shroud of Disease
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, that unit cannot be targeted by ranged attacks unless the attacking unit is within 18".

abilities.name: Droning Chorus
abilities.description: Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [ASSAULT] ability.

abilities.name: Insectile Murmuration
abilities.description: Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is within Contagion Range of one or more DEATH GUARD units from your army, re‑roll a Wound roll of 1.

abilities.name: Rejuvenating Swarm
abilities.description: At the end of each phase, the bearer regains all of its lost wounds.

abilities.name: Plagueveil
abilities.description: While the bearer’s unit is within range of one or more objective markers that you control, that unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

abilities.name: Daemon Weapon of Nurgle
abilities.description: Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

abilities.name: Furnace of Plagues
abilities.description: Add 1 to the Strength and Attacks characteristics of the bearer's melee weapons, and the bearer's melee weapons have the Devastating Wounds abilty.

abilities.name: Lord of the Walking Pox
abilities.description: If the bearer is leading a ^^**Poxwalkers**^^ unit, and is in Strategic Reserves, for the purposes of setting up that unit on the battlefield, treat the current battle round as the third battle round.

abilities.name: Revolting Regeneration
abilities.description: The bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

abilities.name: Eye of Affliction
abilities.description: Ranged weapons equipped by model's in the bearer's unit have the [Ignores Cover] ability while targeting an Afflicted enemy unit.

abilities.name: Talisman of Burgeoning
abilities.description: While the bearer is leading a ^^**Poxwalkers**^^ unit, add 1 to the Toughness characteristic of ^^**Poxwalkers**^^ models in that unit.

abilities.name: Witherbone Pipes
abilities.description: While the bearer is leading a ^^**Poxwalkers**^^ unit, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit, and each time that unit takes a Battle-shock or Leadership test, add 1 to that test.

abilities.name: Sorrowsyphon
abilities.description: While the bearer is leading a ^^**Poxwalkers**^^ unit, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of the bearer's Plague Wind weapon. Each time the bearer makes one or more attacks with a Plague Wind weapon, after the bearer's unit has resolved its attacks, D3 Bodyguard models from the bearer's unit are destroyed.

abilities.name: Face of Death
abilities.description: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer's unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Vile Vigour
abilities.description: While the bearer is leading a unit, add 1" to the Movement characteristics of models in that unit and you can re-roll Advance rolls made for that unit.

abilities.name: Warprot Talisman
abilities.description: Once per battle, at the end of your opponent's turn, if the bearer's unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battle field and place it into Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Helm of the Fly King
abilities.description: While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit cannot be targeted by ranged attacks unless the attacking model is within 18".

abilities.name: Arch Contaminator
abilities.description: While the bearer's unit is within range of an objective marker you control, each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Bilemaw Blight
abilities.description: At the start of your Shooting phase, until the end of the phase, add 12" to the Range characteristics of the bearer's Plague Wind weapon.

abilities.name: Shriekworm Familiar
abilities.description: Once per battle round, you can target the bearer's unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem for 0CP.

abilities.name: Tendrilous Emissions
abilities.description: While the bearer is within 3" of one or more friendly ^^**Death Guard Vehicle**^^ units, the bearer has the Lone Operative ability, and each time one of those ^^**Vehicle**^^ units makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit visible to the bearer, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

abilities.name: Final Ingredient
abilities.description: Once per battle, after the bearer's unit has fought, if one or more ^^**Character**^^ models were destroyed by those attacks, select one Plague. Until the end of the battle, if an enemy unit is Afflicted, that unit has the effect of the selected Plague in addition to any other.

abilities.name: Visions of Virulence
abilities.description: While an enemy unit is enfeebled by the bearer's Pestilent Fallout ability, that unit is also Afflicted.

abilities.name: Needle of Nurgle
abilities.description: Each time the bearer uses its Tainted Narthecium ability, you can return up to D3 destroyed models to the bearer's unit (instead of 1).

abilities.name: Cornucophagus
abilities.description: In the Declare Battle Formations step, select one Plague. Until the end of the battle, while an enemy is within Contagion Range of the bearer, that enemy unit has the effect of that Plague in addition to any other.

abilities.name: Beckoning Blight
abilities.description: Each time a ^^**Plague Legions^^** unit from your army is set up on the battle field using the Deep Strike ability, if it is set up wholly within 12" of the bearer, it can be set up anywhere that is more than 6" horizontally away from any enemy models, instead of more than 9".

abilities.name: Fell Harvester
abilities.description: Add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer's melee weapons.

abilities.name: Entropic Knell
abilities.description: In the Battle-shock step of your opponent's Command phase, each enemy unit within 6" of the bearer that is below its Starting Strength must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.

abilities.name: Tome of Bounteous Blessings
abilities.description: Each time a ^^**Plague Legions^^** unit within 12" of the bearer takes a Battle-shock test, add 1 to that test and, if that test is passed, one model in that unit regains up to D3 lost wounds (if that unit is a ^^**Battleline^^** unit and that test is passed, up to D3 destroyed models can be returned to that unit instead).

abilities.name: Slitherswift Limbs
abilities.description: Add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for this model's unit.

abilities.name: Veil of Flies
abilities.description: Models in this model's unit have the Stealth ability.

abilities.name: Febrile Vitality
abilities.description: Add 1" to the Move characteristic of models in this model's unit.

abilities.name: Billowing Miasma
abilities.description: Add 6" to this model's Contagion Range.

abilities.name: Grossly Swollen
abilities.description: Add 2 to this model's Wounds characteristic.

abilities.name: Leprous Insensibility
abilities.description: This model has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

abilities.name: Writhing Tentacles
abilities.description: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model.

abilities.name: Touch of Rot
abilities.description: Improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model by 1.

abilities.name: Plaguesight
abilities.description: Each time this model makes an attack that targets an Afflicted unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.description: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Daemon Lord of Nurgle (Aura)
abilities.description: While a friendly ^^Plague Legions^^ unit is within 6" of this model, add 1 to the Toughness characteristic of models in that unit.

abilities.name: Nurgle’s Rot (Psychic)
abilities.description: At the end of your Movement phase, you can select one enemy unit within 12" of this model. Until the start of your next Movement phase, that unit is rotted. While a unit is rotted, subtract 1 from the Toughness characteristic of models in that unit.

abilities.description: Improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model by 1.

abilities.name: Plaguesight
abilities.description: Each time this model makes an attack that targets an Afflicted unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Droning Chorus
enhancements.description: Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [ASSAULT] ability.

enhancements.name: Insectile Murmuration
enhancements.description: Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is within Contagion Range of one or more DEATH GUARD units from your army, re‑roll a Wound roll of 1.

enhancements.name: Rejuvenating Swarm
enhancements.description: At the end of each phase, the bearer regains all of its lost wounds.

enhancements.name: Plagueveil
enhancements.description: While the bearer’s unit is within range of one or more objective markers that you control, that unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

enhancements.name: Daemon Weapon of Nurgle
enhancements.description: Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

enhancements.name: Furnace of Plagues
enhancements.description: Add 1 to the Strength and Attacks characteristics of the bearer's melee weapons, and the bearer's melee weapons have the Devastating Wounds abilty.

enhancements.name: Lord of the Walking Pox
enhancements.description: If the bearer is leading a ^^**Poxwalkers**^^ unit, and is in Strategic Reserves, for the purposes of setting up that unit on the battlefield, treat the current battle round as the third battle round.

enhancements.name: Revolting Regeneration
enhancements.description: The bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

enhancements.name: Eye of Affliction
enhancements.description: Ranged weapons equipped by model's in the bearer's unit have the [Ignores Cover] ability while targeting an Afflicted enemy unit.

enhancements.name: Talisman of Burgeoning
enhancements.description: While the bearer is leading a ^^**Poxwalkers**^^ unit, add 1 to the Toughness characteristic of ^^**Poxwalkers**^^ models in that unit.

enhancements.name: Witherbone Pipes
enhancements.description: While the bearer is leading a ^^**Poxwalkers**^^ unit, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit, and each time that unit takes a Battle-shock or Leadership test, add 1 to that test.

enhancements.name: Sorrowsyphon
enhancements.description: While the bearer is leading a ^^**Poxwalkers**^^ unit, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of the bearer's Plague Wind weapon. Each time the bearer makes one or more attacks with a Plague Wind weapon, after the bearer's unit has resolved its attacks, D3 Bodyguard models from the bearer's unit are destroyed.

enhancements.name: Face of Death
enhancements.description: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer's unit must take a Battle-shock test.

enhancements.name: Vile Vigour
enhancements.description: While the bearer is leading a unit, add 1" to the Movement characteristics of models in that unit and you can re-roll Advance rolls made for that unit.

enhancements.name: Warprot Talisman
enhancements.description: Once per battle, at the end of your opponent's turn, if the bearer's unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battle field and place it into Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Helm of the Fly King
enhancements.description: While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit cannot be targeted by ranged attacks unless the attacking model is within 18".

enhancements.name: Arch Contaminator
enhancements.description: While the bearer's unit is within range of an objective marker you control, each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Bilemaw Blight
enhancements.description: At the start of your Shooting phase, until the end of the phase, add 12" to the Range characteristics of the bearer's Plague Wind weapon.

enhancements.name: Shriekworm Familiar
enhancements.description: Once per battle round, you can target the bearer's unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem for 0CP.

enhancements.name: Tendrilous Emissions
enhancements.description: While the bearer is within 3" of one or more friendly ^^**Death Guard Vehicle**^^ units, the bearer has the Lone Operative ability, and each time one of those ^^**Vehicle**^^ units makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit visible to the bearer, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

enhancements.name: Final Ingredient
enhancements.description: Once per battle, after the bearer's unit has fought, if one or more ^^**Character**^^ models were destroyed by those attacks, select one Plague. Until the end of the battle, if an enemy unit is Afflicted, that unit has the effect of the selected Plague in addition to any other.

enhancements.name: Visions of Virulence
enhancements.description: While an enemy unit is enfeebled by the bearer's Pestilent Fallout ability, that unit is also Afflicted.

enhancements.name: Needle of Nurgle
enhancements.description: Each time the bearer uses its Tainted Narthecium ability, you can return up to D3 destroyed models to the bearer's unit (instead of 1).

enhancements.name: Cornucophagus
enhancements.description: In the Declare Battle Formations step, select one Plague. Until the end of the battle, while an enemy is within Contagion Range of the bearer, that enemy unit has the effect of that Plague in addition to any other.

enhancements.name: Beckoning Blight
enhancements.description: Each time a ^^**Plague Legions^^** unit from your army is set up on the battle field using the Deep Strike ability, if it is set up wholly within 12" of the bearer, it can be set up anywhere that is more than 6" horizontally away from any enemy models, instead of more than 9".

enhancements.name: Fell Harvester
enhancements.description: Add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer's melee weapons.

enhancements.name: Entropic Knell
enhancements.description: In the Battle-shock step of your opponent's Command phase, each enemy unit within 6" of the bearer that is below its Starting Strength must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.

enhancements.name: Tome of Bounteous Blessings
enhancements.description: Each time a ^^**Plague Legions^^** unit within 12" of the bearer takes a Battle-shock test, add 1 to that test and, if that test is passed, one model in that unit regains up to D3 lost wounds (if that unit is a ^^**Battleline^^** unit and that test is passed, up to D3 destroyed models can be returned to that unit instead).
